title: Custom Mob Spawns (Renewed!)
description:
Simple configurable mob spawning (1.21.5+).

Fork of Custom Mob Spawns (which is a fork of Custom Spawns) that supports 1.21.5 and beyond.
body:
# Custom Mob Spawns (Renewed!)
https://modrinth.com/project/custom-mob-spawns-(renewed!)

Simple configurable mob spawning.

Fork of Custom Mob Spawns (which is a fork of Custom Spawns) that supports 1.21.5 and beyond. Credits to both  b3spectacled for making the mod in the first place, and AzyLooper for updating it from 1.19.4 to 1.21.1.


## How to install (Client and Server)
Simply place the mod inside your `mods` folder along with Cloth Config and you are ready!

The mod's config files are located in `config/custom-mob-spawn.json`, alternatively if you installed the mod on a client and don't want to go to the config files, you can install Mod Menu and go from there.


## License

This project is licensed under MIT, after commit 0c156bb.

## Original Mod page (Minecraft 1.16.3 - 1.19.4):

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-spawns
### Credits to b3spectacled.

## Initial updated Mod page (Minecraft 1.19.4 - 1.21.1):

https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-mob-spawns
### Credits to AzyLooper.
